name_cn:
Top-tier factory with full packaging
Lady 5-Compartment Matte Pink in stock!!️
The matte series is both practical and exquisite, and the matte leather is much more durable than lambskin🙃. It stands out when worn, can be sweet or chic, casual yet elegant, the most unique Lady of the season🌚
Size:24cm
